name: Cao Buxing
page_title: Cao Buxing 曹不興 [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Cao Buxing was so talented a painter that his pictures seemed to come alive. He was an ornament to the court of Sun Quan. (1)

1) Sanguozhi: Wu 18

sections.short-biography: Such a good painter, his pictures seemed to come alive.

full_text:
Cao Buxing 曹不興
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Buxing (曹不興). Such a good painter, his pictures seemed to come alive. Cao Buxing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
